extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has an Against the Company row with 3 criminal, 11 tax, 5 statutory/regulatory and ₹60.51 million aggregate amount, plus an Against the Directors row with no criminal or tax matters and 1 statutory/regulatory matter; no By rows are disclosed, so the counted categories are criminal 3, regulatory 5+1=6, and tax 11 for the company only. The quantified aggregate amount against the company/group is the table's stated ₹60.51 million total; no subsidiary amount is separately shown, and this converts to ₹6.051 crore (₹60.51 million ÷ ₹10 million per crore). No contingent-liabilities total or date is disclosed in the provided risk section. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the only percentages relate to advertising and other operating metrics, not customer revenue concentration. The litigation table uses ₹ million as its source unit, converted to crore for the aggregate amount field.
